name: Iron Bands of Bilarro
description: This rusty iron sphere measures 3 inches in diameter and weighs 1 pound. You can take a Magic action to throw the sphere at a Huge or smaller creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself. As the sphere moves through the air, it opens into a tangle of metal bands.

properties.appearance: Rusty iron sphere, 3 inches diameter, 1 pound

thrown_attack.target: Huge or smaller creature you can see

hit_effect.duration: Until you issue Bonus Action command to release

thrown_attack.miss_effect: Bands contract and become sphere again

escape.creature: Any creature that can touch the bands (including Restrained creature)
escape.failure: Further escape attempts automatically fail until 24 hours elapse

properties.reuse_duration: Can't be used again until the next dawn
